scripts.dev:restart: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$pids = netstat -ano | Select-String ':5173' | ForEach-Object { ($_ -split '\\s+')[-1] } | Sort-Object -Unique; foreach ($procId in $pids) { if ($procId -and $procId -ne '0') { Stop-Process -Id ([int]$procId) -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; npm run dev"
